topItems.title: A 4-year-old auth-bypass vulnerability hidden in our password-reset API — discovery, hot fix, recovery
topItems.summary: One customer support ticket — "I can't log in, but I never changed my password" — turned into the discovery of a 4-year-old auth-bypass vulnerability in our SaaS's password-reset API. Anyone with an email address could overwrite that account's password by hitting the endpoint directly. Here's the full incident report: discovery, QA reproduction, hot fix, deployment, and recovery.
